feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to disable adding Delivery without base doc (Sales Order)?
entry.content: I am a superuser withing SAL Version 10.0 - Database:HANA. How do I disable the option to add Delivery with no Base Document? ie:Delivery Block

entry.title: Change log for user assignments in HANA DB
entry.content:
we have a request ,to extract the User roles assignements for certain time period in HANADB(ECP HANADB).
for instance,
 
users provisioned and de-provisioned during the period 01 April 2023 to till date to the below roles in HANA DB.

- AUDIT_ADMIN
- PUBLIC

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Certificate which I am looking forward to complete is not available on SAP now
entry.content:
Below certificates are no longer available on SAP, please suggest if any new version or alternate ?

 

 

C_SECAUTH_20 - SAP Certified Technology Associate - SAP System Security and Authorizations Certification (18271)

C_SM100_7210 - SAP Certified Technology Associate - SAP Solution Manager, Mandatory and Managed System Configuration (7.2 SPS10) Certification (18270)

C_TADM70_21 - SAP Certified Technology Associate - OS/DB Migration for SAP NetWeaver 7.52 Certification (16827)

C_TADM_22 - SAP Certified Technology Consultant - SAP S/4HANA System Administration Certification (20641)

C_TADM70_22 - SAP Certified Technology Associate - OS/DB Migration for SAP NetWeaver 7.52 Certification (21312)

entry.title: ENABLE_SSL in DATABASE
entry.content:
Hi 

We are going to ENABLE_SSL in Database please let us know the impact.

Regards,
SAP BASIS

entry.title: i am doing 101k while posting GR got an error pir not found in p.org
entry.content:
I am doing 101k while posting GR got an error Purchasing info record was not found in the purchasing organization. but in the p.o, I use a different p.org, not the one show in error

Please help here

entry.title: ATP Customizing Disappeared
entry.content:
Hi,

After an Upgrade with HANA 2022 some ATP Customizing Functions disappeared and i do not know where to find them. In older HANA Version you had the possibility to tick following options in this customizing step:

Sales- Basic Functions- Availability Check- Availability Check with ATP- Define Availability Check Group 

1. Total Sales

2. Total Deliver Reqs

3. Block with TrO Qties

4. no Pac.

5. Accumul.

6. RelChkPlan

Last 3 options can be found in the new (2022) customizing step Define Basic Availability Check Group Behavior but i cannot find customizing step for the first 3 options, they disappeared.

In the table TMVF are maintained- SM30 did not help.

entry.title: Client Copy by SCCLN - Client Deletion by SCC5N
entry.content:
Hello.

After I execute Local Client Copy with SCCLN by Profile SAP_UCSV, can I delete the Source Client with SCC5N?

The Source Client is 100 and the Target Client is 200.

Because I only need 200 Client. (do not need the application data in 100)

Or is it better to simply lock 100 client (just in case)?

Thank you for all.

entry.title: SAP HANA on IBM POWER
entry.content:
I just wanted to drop a quick note about something special I am hosting on the 18th of April.

IBM is diving into how SAP HANA on IBM Power can be a game-changer for your business.

April 18th at 10:30 am CET

https://ibm.biz/SAP_on_Power

entry.title: HANA Audit log (DML) for a specific table
entry.content:
In HANA DB, how can track the modifications (e.g DELETE) on a specific table?

entry.title: SAP HANA HDBSQL to execute SQL commands at OS level in background
entry.content:
Hi SAP, we would like to seek for your expertise regarding how we can execute HANASQL command in background via OS level. This is for the preparation of the incoming Online table partition.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: [BIG PROBLEM] SAP Host Agent cannot connect to SYSTEMDB
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am totally nuts about the following problem:

# /usr/sap/hostctrl/exe/saphostctrl -function ListDatabases

The passwords of <SID>adm, SYSTEM in SYSTEMDB and SAPDBCTRL are 100% correct, tried them all out.

SAP Note 

2023587 - Maintaining SAP HANA user store using SetDatabaseProperty for SAP Host Agent

is NOT helping

SAP Note 

2621457 - hdbconnectivity failure after upgrade to 2.0

is NOT helping

Please kindly advise how to get this solved.

entry.title: How to write the sum of same values into each line in a CalculationView?
entry.content:
Hi friends,

I am trying to create calculated columns in a HANA Calculation View. The calculated columns should show the sum of IDs with same characteristics.  E.g. we have 7 IDs with the TYPE "W05" and 6 IDs with the TYPE "W10". The endresult should contain the table with all IDs, where we have in the calculated column the values "7" or "6" in each row with TYPE "W05" or Type "W10".

Here is an example of three calculated columns that I need to create (AMOUNT_SAME_TYPE, AMOUNT_SAME_TYPE_CHARNAM_CHARVAL, AMOUNT_SAME_CHARNAM_CHARVAL):

IDTYPECHARNAMCHARVALAMOUNT_SAME_TYPEAMOUNT_SAME_TYPE_CHARNAM_CHARVALAMOUNT_SAME_CHARNAM_CHARVAL
W05001W05GW_G02242736
W05002W05GW_G02242736
W05003W05GW_G02242736
W05004W05GW_G02354723
W05005W05GW_G02354723
W05006W05GW_D07100712
W05007W05GW_D07200712
W10001W10GW_G02242636
W10002W10GW_G02242636
W10003W10GW_G02242636
W10005W10GW_G02354613
W10006W10GW_D07100612
W10007W10GW_D07200612

I have no idea, how I can archieve this.. Is here an expert that could help me with my issue?

entry.title: Setup email alerts and where to check email history in HANA cockpit 2.0
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am setting up email alerts for daily instance backup in HANA cockpit 2.0 as per our customer request. Our customer would like to receive daily email that whether daily backup is successful or fail. As our customer SAP are running on version 10 HANA so the scheduled backup setup from HANA cockpit 2.0. I have setup email alert for daily backup in cockpit but I don't receive the email alerts upon backup is successful or fail. I checked the server is able to reached to email server but I am still not receiving the email notification from cockpit. Hence, please advise if there is any note I can follow how to check email history in cockpit 2.0 or any note to follow to configure any additional step to configure in order to receive the email. For now, I am following SAP HANA Administration with SAP HANA Cockpit. Actually, it is simple to setup email configuration however email still not receive. 

Thank you

entry.title: How to Get history of SQL Statements ran for one year in SAP HANA
entry.content:
Hi,

Could you please let me know how to get list of SQL Queries which was ran in SAP PERSON_NAME Studio  for last one year ?

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: mergedog parameters - LOADED and CURR
entry.content:
Can someone tell me what the mergedog parameters 'LOADED' and 'CURR' mean?

thanks,

James

entry.title: How to add Grant role and privilege to the user, error 258 insufficient privilege
entry.content:
Unable to create views in FARCHIVE1 due to the error message 

[SAP AG][LIBODBCHDB32 DLL][HDBODBC32] General error;258 insufficient privilege: Detailed info for this error can be found with guid '3A75978E5E879244828150ABCA9C08AD'

 




------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Access virtual tables (HANA Smart Data Access) in my CAP project
entry.content:
Greetings, community experts.

I have the following scenario, which is completely new to me (due to the combination of technologies it has):

I am working on a CAP application on SAP BTP, with the HANA Cloud database and SAP Fiori Elements (technologies that I am familiar with).

However, some of the data tables that my CAP application must use come from an external system, a SAP ECC system, connected to BTP via Cloud Connector, and using HANA Smart Data Access (SDA) to create virtual tables in HANA (duplicates of tables in SAP ECC).

This second one is a new scenario for me. In particular, what I need to know (and be able to do) is how to put those virtual tables inside my CAP application so I can use them to create views and define services?

For example, how do I put or introduce those virtual tables within the HDI Container and Schema of my application?
Is it necessary to do some kind of cross-container access configuration, using synonyms and others, as explained in this post (https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/how-to-share-tables-across-different-cap-projects/bc-p/13676559#M166997)?

I understand that I should use CDS annotations like @CDS.persistence.exists which prevent the creation of the corresponding objects in HANA, beyond that I know little.

Thank you in advance for any help and/or comments that may shed light on how to approach this scenario.

entry.title: How can I change SAP schema user (e.g SAPABAP1 or SAPHANADB) password?
entry.content:
You are using hdbuserstore to connect to SAP application server (e.g S/4HANA).
You plan to change the password for HANA DB schema user, you want to know how to achieve it.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Hana2 sp7 - A calculation view has different behavior if used alone or in another view
entry.content:
We have graphical calculation view which exposes the currency data but, in our production environment only, if we use this view in another calculation view in a projection node as in the following image (view "_SYS_BIC"."WFP.SCOPE/CA_CO_DIST_LIST_COPY_HAP_NEW"):

we have a different behavior if we check the data into the original currency view CA_EXCHANGE_RATES_NEW (UN_EXCHANGE_RATE = 12.500 and FROM_RATIO = 10 for Currency = SYP)

Or if we display the data into the projection_node named Exchange_rate which contains the view CA_EXCHANGE_RATES_NEW (UN_EXCHANGE_RATE = 1.250 and FROM_RATIO = 1 for Currency = SYP):

Into the projection node there is only a filter which excludes some records:

This issue doesn’t involves all the currency but only 3 CURRENCY out of the over 100 in our system, but the strangest thing is that in the data preview of the node Exchange_rate if we insert also other currencies as a filter the result becomes correct again (UN_EXCHANGE_RATE = 12.500 and FROM_RATIO = 10 for Currency = SYP if we display also another currency for example the currency IRR in this case):

But if we perform a select on the node of the view the result for UN_EXCHANGE_RATE is always wrong (1.250 instead of 12.500):

And if we perform a select on the final view "_SYS_BIC"."WFP.SCOPE/CA_CO_DIST_LIST_COPY_HAP_NEW" we have a wrong result 25.977.194,4 for TRANSFER_CASH_VALUE_IN_USD (which is obtained from the formula 32.471.493.000 / 1.250 instead of 32.471.493.000 / 12.500):

when is the correct value from Dev. System 2.597.719,44:

We have this issue only on prod. environment, we have the same calculation view on our Dev. system that works correctly. Both Hana dev. and Hana prod have the same Version 2 SP 7

Any Advice?

Regards

Luca

entry.title: How to set a limit for SQL execution time in SAP HANA database ?
entry.content:
We want to set a maximum SQL execution time.
It's to forcibly cancel the long running SQL when the SQL execution time exceeds the specified parameter.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
